title: Turkey Passes Legislation to Bar Children Under 15 From Social Media
summary_full: The government says the measure, which must be signed into law by the president, will protect minors. Critics worry it will threaten free speech and privacy online.
summary_public: The government says the measure, which must be signed into law by the president, will protect minors. Critics worry it will threaten free speech and privacy online.

TR.label: neutral
TR.evidence: Critics worry it will threaten free speech and privacy online.
